records.ety: [L. gonorrhoea, Gr. <?/; <?/ that which begets, semen, the genitals + <?/ to flow: cf. F. gonorrhe.]

defs: A contagious inflammatory disease of the genitourinary tract, affecting especially the urethra and vagina, and characterized by a mucopurulent discharge, pain in urination, and chordee; clap. It is caused by infection with the bacterium Neiseria gonorrheae, and is commonly transmitted by sexual intercourse.
